notes: Curated Feed removes raw catalog filler and prioritizes well-rated, widely reviewed games
Inspired themes now restyle the full interface: navigation, headings, cards, controls, chips, cover frames, backgrounds, and motion
Original theme emblems now appear contextually in page headers and subtle interface atmosphere
GameVault and Inspired theme groups collapse independently and remember their state
Franchise lists and Collection franchise tiles collapse cleanly, including their search controls
Android and iOS keep all existing on-device library data during the update
